'''âj-v-t''' ('''javata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacciolate|vacciolate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacciolate|vacciolate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-v-t
|-
! Lemma
| javata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:javatithi|javatithi]] || [[word:javatiji|javatiji]] || [[word:javatishi|javatishi]] || [[word:javati|javati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:javatuthuth|javatuthuth]] || [[word:javatujuj|javatujuj]] || [[word:javatushush|javatushush]] || [[word:javat|javat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:javatuthu|javatuthu]] || [[word:javatuju|javatuju]] || [[word:javatushu|javatushu]] || [[word:javatu|javatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:javatufuth|javatufuth]] || [[word:javatufuj|javatufuj]] || [[word:javatufush|javatufush]] || [[word:javatuf|javatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:javatethe|javatethe]] || [[word:javateje|javateje]] || [[word:javateshe|javateshe]] || [[word:javate|javate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:javatothoth|javatothoth]] || [[word:javatojoj|javatojoj]] || [[word:javatoshosh|javatoshosh]] || [[word:javat|javat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:javatotho|javatotho]] || [[word:javatojo|javatojo]] || [[word:javatosho|javatosho]] || [[word:javato|javato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:javatofoth|javatofoth]] || [[word:javatofoj|javatofoj]] || [[word:javatofosh|javatofosh]] || [[word:javatof|javatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:javatĂŠthĂŠ|javatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:javatĂŠjĂŠ|javatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:javatĂŠshĂŠ|javatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:javatĂŠ|javatĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:javatathath|javatathath]] || [[word:javatajaj|javatajaj]] || [[word:javatashash|javatashash]] || [[word:javat|javat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:javatatha|javatatha]] || [[word:javataja|javataja]] || [[word:javatasha|javatasha]] || [[word:javata|javata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:javatafath|javatafath]] || [[word:javatafaj|javatafaj]] || [[word:javatafash|javatafash]] || [[word:javataf|javataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:javatasha|javatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojavatasha|gojavatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijavatasha|gokijavatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:javatnĂŒsha|javatnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojavatnknĂŒsha|gojavatnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijavatnĂŒsha|gokijavatnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:javatshĂ«sha|javatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojavatnkshĂ«sha|gojavatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijavatshĂ«sha|gokijavatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:javatrosha|javatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojavatnkrosha|gojavatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijavatrosha|gokijavatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:javatmusha|javatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavatnkmusha|gojavatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavatmusha|gokijavatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:javatsherasha|javatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojavatnksherasha|gojavatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijavatsherasha|gokijavatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:javatngasha|javatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojavatnkngasha|gojavatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijavatngasha|gokijavatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:javatyasha|javatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojavatnkyasha|gojavatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijavatyasha|gokijavatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:javatyamasha|javatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojavatnkyamasha|gojavatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijavatyamasha|gokijavatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:javatnĂŒshĂ«sha|javatnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojavatnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojavatnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijavatnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijavatnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:javatnĂŒrosha|javatnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojavatnknĂŒrosha|gojavatnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijavatnĂŒrosha|gokijavatnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javatnĂŒmusha|javatnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavatnknĂŒmusha|gojavatnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavatnĂŒmusha|gokijavatnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:javatshĂ«nĂŒsha|javatshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojavatnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojavatnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijavatshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijavatshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:javatshĂ«rosha|javatshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojavatnkshĂ«rosha|gojavatnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijavatshĂ«rosha|gokijavatshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javatshĂ«musha|javatshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavatnkshĂ«musha|gojavatnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavatshĂ«musha|gokijavatshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:javatronĂŒsha|javatronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojavatnkronĂŒsha|gojavatnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijavatronĂŒsha|gokijavatronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:javatroshĂ«sha|javatroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojavatnkroshĂ«sha|gojavatnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijavatroshĂ«sha|gokijavatroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javatromusha|javatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavatnkromusha|gojavatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavatromusha|gokijavatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:javatmunĂŒsha|javatmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojavatnkmunĂŒsha|gojavatnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijavatmunĂŒsha|gokijavatmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:javatmushĂ«sha|javatmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojavatnkmushĂ«sha|gojavatnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijavatmushĂ«sha|gokijavatmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:javatmurosha|javatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojavatnkmurosha|gojavatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijavatmurosha|gokijavatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:javat|javat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠt|jĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojavat|hojavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠvĂŠt|hojĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojavat|hohojavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠvĂŠt|hohojĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjavat|nĂŒjavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠvĂŠt|nĂŒjĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjavat|nĂŒnĂŒjavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠvĂŠt|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjavat|nĂŻjavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠvĂŠt|nĂŻjĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjavat|nĂŻnĂŻjavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠvĂŠt|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujavat|lujavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠvĂŠt|lujĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujavat|lulujavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠvĂŠt|lulujĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijavat|lijavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠvĂŠt|lijĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijavat|lilijavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠvĂŠt|lilijĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojavat|kojavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠvĂŠt|kojĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojavat|kokojavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠvĂŠt|kokojĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejavat|kejavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠvĂŠt|kejĂŠvĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejavat|kekejavat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠvĂŠt|kekejĂŠvĂŠt]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
